phase: transform-exact strict-decision confirmatory rerun after declared v1 audit erratum
audit_name: MOSAIC transform-exact independent strict-decision replay v2
claim_boundary: This synthetic study tests the exact confidence envelope only under the registered finite transform polytope and contamination model. It does not establish real-domain shift membership, clinical safety, or literature novelty.

protocol_amendment.classification: post-outcome mechanical correction with prediction recorded before rerun
protocol_amendment.trigger: The locked v1 independent audit reproduced every certificate and external risk but found decision mismatches in rows 8334 and 9160.
protocol_amendment.root_cause: The v1 runner relied on optimizer feasibility for privacy, which permits a 2e-7 post-hoc tolerance, while the independent replay required each deployment certificate to clear the privacy threshold within 1e-10.
protocol_amendment.correction: The deployment rule now explicitly rechecks every privacy certificate at threshold plus 1e-10, matching the utility decision and independent replay.
protocol_amendment.prediction_before_rerun: With the unchanged v1 tables and seeds, exactly rows 8334 and 9160 should change from deploy to abstain. No external-safety label, false-acceptance count, n=125 gate, n=250 gate, theorem, optimizer, threshold, population, seed, or pass condition should change.

pass_conditions.complete_execution: Exactly 1000 paired results for both methods in every registered cell, with unique seeds and no solver failure.
pass_conditions.coverage: Each method has false-acceptance rate at most delta in every cell and zero false acceptances on the simultaneous confidence event.
pass_conditions.pointwise_dominance: Transform-exact certified worst error is no larger than capacity transfer on every paired table, within 2e-7.
pass_conditions.audit: An independent program must replay every confidence event, privacy certificate, utility certificate, external risk, decision, aggregate, and paired dominance comparison with zero mismatch.

stopping_rule: Run every registered table and both methods. No outcome-based early stopping, seed replacement, threshold change, scenario change, or pass-condition change is permitted.
reporting: Report the failed v1 audit, this amendment, all v2 cells and paired rows, including abstentions, negative results, and any failed gate.
